text: The space feels open and a little sterile, like a stage awaiting actors or an unscripted play about to begin. Then, as I enter a new room awash with art and research displays, I am struck by how ideas and innovation take the stage in contrast to the quiet emptiness of the previous environment. Here, curiosity is kindled and a sense of purpose stirs within me—I am where minds converge, eager to bridge the abstract and the tangible.
